common.subtitle: Carpool & Fleet Management Platform · AD Ports Group
common.comingSoonBody: This workspace area is not available yet.

accessDenied.title: Access restricted
accessDenied.body: You don't have the role needed to view this area. If you believe this is a mistake, contact your system administrator.

home.title: Fleet operations
home.subtitle: The new design language is in place. Explore the system and sample screens.
home.designDescription: Brand, tokens, typography and components — in light, dark and Arabic (RTL).
home.bookingDescription: A calm-register screen built from the new tokens and patterns.

showcase.title: Design system
showcase.subtitle: One type family, tokenised colour, and the signature patterns — toggle theme and language in the header to verify light/dark and RTL.

sample.title: Where to today?
sample.lead: Find an eligible pool vehicle. The core booking journey completes in under two minutes.

booking.title: Where to today?
booking.subtitle: Pick a window and we'll match you with an eligible vehicle. Consent is signed before submission — no consent, no booking number.

policyStudio.title: Policy studio
policyStudio.description: Author typed decision rules, test the matched path, and activate immutable versions without changing application code.
policyStudio.saveFailed: Could not save the policy draft
policyStudio.activateDescription: The current active version will be superseded and the runtime cache will refresh on the next decision.
policyStudio.defaultMatched: No row matched — mandatory default used
policyStudio.loadFailedBody: The policy catalogue or fact metadata could not be loaded.

organization.title: Organisation management
organization.description: Review the reusable hierarchy, stable scope codes and readiness gaps before enabling hierarchy-scoped policies.
organization.loadFailedBody: The organisation settings or hierarchy could not be loaded.
organization.qualityWarning: Hierarchy needs attention before scoped policy activation
organization.noNodesBody: Create the organisation root before assigning scopes.
organization.noDirectRoles: No direct assignments; access may be inherited from a parent scope.
organization.noRecentTransfers: No recent vehicle transfers touch this scope.
organization.readOnlyNote: This first slice is read-only. Add, rename, move and retire operations unlock after database and impact-preview gates pass.
organization.moveDeferredNote: Add, rename and guarded retirement are live. Subtree move remains disabled until lock-and-impact concurrency tests pass.
organization.writeFailed: The hierarchy change could not be saved
organization.impactBlocked: Retirement is blocked by {{count}} active dependency groups.

dialog.description: Changes apply under {{name}} and are recorded in audit history.

retire.title: Retire scope
retire.description: Dependency impact is checked before retirement. Historical records remain intact.

organization.writeGovernanceNote: All hierarchy changes use revisions, impact checks, append-only history, tamper-evident audit and outbox events.

levels.title: Hierarchy levels
levels.description: Drag to reorder or use the arrow controls. Populated levels can only move when existing parent-child edges remain valid.
levels.dialogDescription: Labels are organization-specific; the stable code drives logic and policy scope.

quality.organization-active-root-count: {{count}} active roots found; exactly one is required.
quality.hierarchy-missing-codes: {{count}} hierarchy nodes are missing stable codes.
quality.hierarchy-missing-arabic-names: {{count}} hierarchy nodes are missing Arabic names.
quality.hierarchy-missing-level-codes: {{count}} hierarchy nodes are missing level codes.
quality.people-without-home-scope: {{count}} people do not have a home scope.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.body: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again, or return to the home page.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you are looking for does not exist or has moved.

auth.subtitle: Sign in to the fleet operations platform.
auth.devPick: Select a user to sign in without SSO.
auth.skipHint: No seeded users found. Continue into the app without signing in (development only).
auth.sso: Sign in with your organisation account
auth.ssoHint: Single sign-on via Microsoft Entra ID.
auth.ssoUnavailable: Single sign-on is not configured for this environment.
auth.ssoError: Single sign-on could not be started. Please try again.
auth.devHint: Developer sign-in — available in lower environments only.
auth.devUnknownUser: No person was found for that ID.
auth.securityNote: Protected by AD Ports Group access controls.
auth.benefitAccess: Role- and scope-based access to your fleet.
auth.benefitAudit: Every action is logged and auditable.
